The GhostVLAD approach is a pooling technique that was originally proposed for face recognition. It has been adapted to improve the performance of language identification for Indian languages. The approach involves reducing the dimensions of the data through the use of t-sne projection. The approach has been tested and proven to be effective in improving the performance of language identification.
